title: Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions:
Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma Ventures Solutions!
